user.title: Set up Network Quality
user.description: Configure ISP, contract data, monitoring options and region details.

data_description.name: Display name of this integration instance. Source: manually set by you.
data_description.isp: Name of your internet provider. Source: contract, customer portal, or invoice.
data_description.router_type: Type of router you use. Source: router model shown in router UI or manual.
data_description.download_min: Lower download threshold used for evaluation. Source: copied from your contract values.
data_description.download_normal: Typical/contracted download value. Source: ISP tariff data from contract or product sheet.
data_description.download_max: Maximum download value of your tariff. Source: ISP tariff data.
data_description.upload_min: Lower upload threshold used for evaluation. Source: copied from your contract values.
data_description.upload_normal: Typical/contracted upload value. Source: ISP tariff data from contract or product sheet.
data_description.upload_max: Maximum upload value of your tariff. Source: ISP tariff data.
data_description.region: Suggested from Home Assistant location name or entered manually. Source: HA configuration or user input.
data_description.speedtest_interval: How often speedtest results are processed. Source: interval set by you (seconds).
data_description.ping_interval: How often ping results are processed. Source: interval set by you (seconds).
data_description.traceroute_interval: How often traceroute results are processed. Source: interval set by you (seconds).
data_description.download_test_interval: How often download tests are processed. Source: interval set by you (seconds).
data_description.upload_test_interval: How often upload tests are processed. Source: interval set by you (seconds).
data_description.status_interval: How often status checks run. Source: interval set by you (seconds).
data_description.external_opt_in: Enables external service checks. Source: your consent in the config flow.
data_description.test_targets: Targets for reachability tests (one per line). Source: user input; integration defaults are used when empty.
data_description.agent_url: Local measurement agent endpoint. Source: URL of your local agent (e.g. /metrics).
data_description.service_amazon: Enables/disables monitoring for this service. Source: predefined service catalog, selected by user input.
